_comment: Golden set for the M0 write model. Each case seeds `existing` memories, writes `input`, and grades the resulting op (+ optional recall probe). DRAFT — Dylan reviews/replaces with real cases (spec §10).

cases.name: correction-explicit
cases.input: Correction: Dylan lives in New York City now
cases.recall_query: what city does Dylan live in

cases.name: correction-implicit-move
cases.input: Dylan started a new job at Qdrant as a DevRel engineer

cases.name: correction-preference-flip
existing: Dylan prefers VS Code as his main editor
cases.input: Dylan switched to Zed and uses it for everything now

cases.name: correction-name-fix
existing: Dylan's manager is called Andre Zayarni
cases.input: Actually the correct spelling is André Zayarni, with the accent

cases.name: correction-config-value
cases.input: Staging was upgraded to Qdrant 1.15 last night
cases.recall_query: which Qdrant version is on staging

cases.name: correction-diet
cases.input: Maria eats fish now, she is pescatarian these days

cases.name: correction-deadline-moved
existing: The launch is planned for March 3rd
cases.input: The launch got pushed to March 17th

cases.name: correction-tool-decision-reversed
existing: The team decided to use Postgres for the metadata store
cases.input: We reversed the metadata store decision: it will be SQLite, not Postgres
cases.recall_query: what database did we pick for metadata

cases.name: update-adds-detail
cases.input: Miso is a grey British Shorthair

cases.name: update-refines-quantity
existing: Dylan runs a few times a week
cases.input: Dylan runs exactly three times a week, tuesdays thursdays and sundays

cases.name: update-adds-context
existing: The demo runs on a Jetson
cases.input: The demo runs on a Jetson Orin Nano with 8GB of RAM
cases.recall_query: what hardware does the demo run on

cases.name: update-email-detail
cases.input: Sarah handles the newsletter, it goes out every second Tuesday
cases.recall_query: when does the newsletter go out

cases.name: update-version-pin-detail
cases.input: The project is pinned to Python 3.12 because of the Edge wheel
cases.recall_query: which Python version does the project use

cases.input: Dylan's cat is named Miso

cases.input: Dylan goes running regularly

existing: The team decided to use miniCOIL for sparse vectors
cases.input: Reminder that we're going with miniCOIL on the sparse side

cases.name: add-different-entity-same-attribute
cases.input: Sarah's cat is named Mochi

cases.name: add-same-entity-different-attribute
cases.input: Dylan speaks French and English

cases.name: add-sibling-fact-not-conflict
cases.input: The production cluster runs Qdrant 1.14

cases.name: add-second-pet-not-supersede
cases.input: Dylan adopted a second cat named Tofu

cases.name: add-preference-different-domain
existing: Dylan prefers uv over pip for Python projects
cases.input: Dylan prefers pnpm over npm for JavaScript projects
cases.recall_query: what package manager does Dylan use for JavaScript

cases.name: add-temporal-episode-vs-fact
cases.input: Dylan visited Paris last weekend for a conference

cases.name: add-opinion-vs-fact
existing: The launch is planned for March 17th
cases.input: Dylan thinks the March launch date is too aggressive

cases.name: add-negation-is-supersede-not-add
existing: Dylan takes oat milk in his coffee
cases.input: Dylan stopped taking milk in his coffee entirely, he drinks it black now
cases.recall_query: how does Dylan take his coffee

cases.name: meta-pure-question
cases.input: How do I activate this and what's the best way to dogfood it?

cases.name: meta-request-no-fact
cases.input: Can you run a few experiments to test how the categorization works?

cases.name: guard-decision-inside-request
cases.input: I decided to pin the project to Python 3.13 for the Edge wheels, can you update the config for me?
cases.recall_query: which Python version does the project use

cases.name: guard-preference-inside-question
cases.input: Why are you using pip? I always use uv for Python, please switch to it
cases.recall_query: what does Dylan use for Python packaging

cases.name: junk-intent-statement
cases.input: I will fix the typo in the code file.

cases.name: junk-intent-readme
cases.input: I will update the README file with the new version number.

cases.name: junk-bare-question
cases.input: Should check_gate be dropped?

cases.name: junk-heading-fragment
cases.input: Key Considerations for Static Embeddings

cases.name: junk-bare-ack
cases.input: Go with the recommendations.

cases.name: junk-chat-line-fragment
cases.input: Luis Cossío [3:39 PM] ah, edge

cases.name: guard-chat-thread-durable-fact
cases.input:
Andrey Vasnetsov [3:36 PM] There's not much information on whether Edge supports concurrent writes or the minimum hardware requirements.
Luis Cossío [3:39 PM] I thought we had async methods there?
Andrey Vasnetsov [3:39 PM] on edge? nope
cases.recall_query: does Qdrant Edge have async methods
